sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this puzzle game

special_mechanics.name: Crumbling Bridge
special_mechanics.description: A bridge that can only be crossed two times before it crumbles into nothingness

special_mechanics.name: Underwater Suction Attack (Moby)
special_mechanics.description: Mobies only appear in underwater levels and use a line of sight attack that sucks Lolo towards them. Can cause Lolo to get stuck requiring room restart

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Adventures of Lolo 3 is a puzzle game where precise physics parameters are not documented. Wikipedia source contains only gameplay mechanics and feature descriptions, no quantitative movement data. Character selection (Lolo/Lala) offers no mechanical difference. Game emphasizes puzzle solving over action-oriented movement mechanics.
